## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Daniel Ryan (Generalist Labs) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital)](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) has experienced rapid growth, reaching $4M ARR in 34 weeks with 30 clients and 24 employees](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [fwd.digital is seeking AI-native, entrepreneurial talent to help scale operations and develop innovative solutions](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Daniel has transitioned from tech sales to building full-stack AI applications, aligning with fwd.digital's needs](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest in further exploring a potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and Company Growth

  - [Originally from Brazil, moved to Texas at 11](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Career progression: IBM, HP, HashiCorp, ServiceTitan, DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Founded fwd.digital after success with AI-driven content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Rapid growth: $4M ARR, 30 clients, 24 employees in 34 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Closing high-value deals (e.g., $135k with RAMP, $216k/year with Smith.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Considering raising capital despite being profitable](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### fwd.digital's Business Model and Challenges

  - [Builds AI workflows for content creation and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Combines AI automation with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Key challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Scaling operations while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
      - [Training new hires on rapidly evolving workflows](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
      - [Standardizing processes for client onboarding and management](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [Developing a marketplace concept for AI agents and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### Daniel's Background and Skillset

  - [Worked in tech sales in San Francisco (Yelp, boutique services company)](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Transitioned to building full-stack AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Self-described as "AI obsessed" with a focus on automation and problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Seeks a role that allows for building impactful solutions in a growing company](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Marcel expressed interest in Daniel's AI-native approach and problem-solving skills](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Both agreed to schedule a follow-up meeting to explore specific challenges and potential solutions](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Daniel offered to showcase his portfolio and potentially work on a live problem-solving session](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a 1-hour follow-up meeting next week](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Marcel to review Daniel's portfolio and prepare a specific challenge to discuss](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Daniel to prepare a walkthrough of his projects and how they might apply to fwd.digital's needs](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of a live problem-solving session during the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/YAtfqUJLyScAYyk1UQi5uVxxxJLT-zVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
